idea-plugin.name: LogPose
idea-plugin.description:
LogPose — read your Android network traffic without the logcat pain

LogPose gives you a tool window that captures each HTTP request/response as a single, structured transaction — no interleaved lines, no mismatched bodies, no manual JSON pretty-printing.

  • Expand/collapse and select individual requests
  • Filter by URL, status class (status:5xx), method, or exclusion (-heartbeat)
  • Pretty-printed request & response bodies on demand
  • First-class multipart upload (S3 / GCS) metadata instead of raw bytes

Pair it with the LogPose OkHttp interceptor on the device, which emits one structured line per transaction. Works in IntelliJ IDEA and Android Studio.
